message:
test(core): add property-based tests for e-process drift detector (ft-2p9cb.4.2.3)

11 proptests: e_value nonneg, observation count, null e_value=1, running
mean convergence, alarm count monotonic, reset restores, history bounded,
kind/alert/degradation serde, alarm rate bounded. All 191 proptests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
